nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 智利
nodes.summary: 智利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联200种鸟类，包括北山䳍、南山䳍、凤头䳍等200种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿根廷
nodes.summary: 阿根廷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联495种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、南山䳍等495种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 火地群岛
nodes.summary: 火地群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括灰船鸭、赤琵嘴鴨、White-winged coot等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed hawk
nodes.summary: Rufous-tailed hawk（Rufous-tailed hawk，学名 Buteo ventralis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于阿根廷、智利、火地群岛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-tailed hawk is found in southern Argentina and Chile, including the entire region of Tierra del Fuego

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-tailed hawk is found in southern Argentina and Chile, including the entire region of Tierra del Fuego

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-tailed hawk is found in southern Argentina and Chile, including the entire region of Tierra del Fuego

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Rufous-tailed hawks are threatened by many factors, especially habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Rufous-tailed hawks have been losing their habitat because of logging, over grazing by sheep and cattle, and the growth of Pinus and Eucalyptus plantations. Pinus radiata and Eucalyptus globulus are fast-growing invasive plants that were introduced in order to spur the timber industry in Chile. The other main threat to rufous-tailed hawks are local people, who sometimes kill these birds because rufous-tailed hawks attack and eat their domesticated animals
